# Polaris Documentation

> User documentation for Polaris, an onchain yield layer built around pETH, a yield-bearing reserve asset designed to collateralize censorship-resistant stablecoins and synthetic assets.

## Agent Guidance

- Polaris is currently on the Sepolia public testnet; testnet assets have no monetary value, no production redemption, and no mainnet claim.
- Do not infer production addresses, production constants, audit status, or launch status from testnet values.
- Prefer the Markdown URLs in this file for retrieval, and cite the canonical URL shown beside each page.

## Machine-readable artifacts

- [Complete docs bundle](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-full.txt): Full sanitized Markdown for every public docs page.
- [JSON docs index](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-index.json): Routes, canonical URLs, Markdown URLs, sections, keywords, and freshness metadata.
- [Well-known llms.txt mirror](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/.well-known/llms.txt): Alternate discovery path for the docs index.
- [Well-known full bundle mirror](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/.well-known/llms-full.txt): Alternate discovery path for the full Markdown bundle.
- [Overview section bundle](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/overview.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Core Assets section bundle](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/core-assets.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Core Architecture section bundle](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/architecture.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Protocol Mechanics section bundle](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/design.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Using Polaris Testnet section bundle](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/testnet.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.
- [Risks section bundle](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-sections/risks.txt): Focused Markdown bundle for this documentation section.

## Overview

- [Introduction](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/index.md): Polaris is an onchain yield layer built around pETH. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/
- [Manifesto](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/overview/manifesto.md): Decentralized finance was built on the idea that money should not depend on trusted intermediaries. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/overview/manifesto
- [Vision](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/overview/vision.md): Stablecoins are the largest monetary application built on blockchains today. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/overview/vision
- [Why pETH](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/overview/why-peth.md): The evolution of stablecoins revealed another structural problem. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/overview/why-peth

## Core Assets

- [fpETH](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/fpeth.md): One of the unique properties of pETH is that it has both a market price and a mathematically-derived floor. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/fpeth
- [GOLDp](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/goldp.md): GOLDp is the Polaris digital gold. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/goldp
- [pETH](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/peth.md): pETH is the native yield-bearing asset of Polaris. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/peth
- [POLAR](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/polar.md): POLAR is the token powering Polaris. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/polar
- [USDp](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/usdp.md): USDp is the native Polaris dollar. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/usdp
- [vpETH](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/vpeth.md): Every time pETH trades above its mathematically-derived floor, the difference represents its market premium. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/core-assets/vpeth

## Core Architecture

- [Bonding Curve](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/bonding-curve.md): Bonding curves have been used across crypto for years, particularly in DEXs and launchpads. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/bonding-curve
- [Earn Vaults](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/earn-vaults.md): Earn Vaults allow pAssets minted through Polaris to become yield-bearing assets. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/earn-vaults
- [Flows](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/flows.md): Flows distribute protocol-generated value to applications, markets and integrations building on top of Polaris. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/flows
- [pAsset Markets](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/passet-markets.md): pAssets are currencies and synthetic assets issued against pETH using the shared collateral infrastructure provided by Polaris. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/passet-markets
- [Reserve Loans](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/reserve-loans.md): Reserve Loans are one of the core financial primitives introduced by Polaris, allowing users to borrow ETH directly from the bonding curve reserve. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/reserve-loans
- [Stewardship](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/stewardship.md): Polaris uses bounded stewardship instead of open-ended governance. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/stewardship
- [Tokenomics](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/tokenomics.md): The final POLAR allocation, vesting schedule and launch parameters will be published closer to launch once they have been finalized. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/architecture/tokenomics

## Protocol Mechanics

- [Adaptive Peg Defence](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/adaptive-peg-defence.md): Polaris uses permissionless minting and redemptions to help pAssets trade around their target price. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/adaptive-peg-defence
- [Conversions](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/conversions.md): As introduced in the POLAR section, the long-term supply of POLAR does not grow through perpetual emissions. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/conversions
- [Fee Router](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/fee-router.md): The Fee Router is the system that redirects value generated by Polaris back into the ecosystem. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/fee-router
- [Interest Rates](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/interest-rates.md): Polaris uses two complementary interest rates to manage pAsset markets. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/interest-rates
- [Liquidations](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/liquidations.md): When a user mints a pAsset, they do so against pETH collateral. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/liquidations
- [Oracles](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/oracles.md): Polaris is built around the idea that the protocol should determine its own behavior whenever possible. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/oracles
- [Recovery Mode](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/recovery-mode.md): Recovery Mode is the protective state a pAsset market enters when its overall collateralization falls below a critical threshold. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/recovery-mode
- [Revenue Model](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/revenue-model.md): Polaris operates under the design philosophy that value generated throughout the protocol should not leak externally. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/revenue-model
- [Spike-and-decay Fees](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/spike-and-decay-fees.md): Several core mechanisms across Polaris use spike-and-decay pricing. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/spike-and-decay-fees

## Using Polaris Testnet

- [Advanced](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/advanced.md): Protocol operations that go beyond the standard user flows. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/advanced
- [Analytics](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/analytics.md): A real-time overview of protocol activity throughout the testnet. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/analytics
- [Dashboard](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/dashboard.md): The Dashboard provides a complete overview of your activity across Polaris. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/dashboard
- [Earn](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/earn.md): Deposit into the auto-compounding sUSDp and sGOLDp Earn Vaults. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/earn
- [Guide](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/guide.md): Detailed explanations of every core interaction available during the testnet. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/guide
- [Liquidity](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/liquidity.md): Provide liquidity to Polaris pools and earn a share of the swap fees they generate. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/liquidity
- [Mint](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/mint.md): The Mint section is where collateralized positions are created and managed. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/mint
- [Reserve Loan](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/reserve-loan.md): Borrow ETH by using fpETH as collateral through non-liquidatable Reserve Loans. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/reserve-loan
- [Split](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/split.md): Split allows you to separate pETH into fpETH and vpETH, or merge those two assets back into pETH whenever you choose. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/split
- [Swap](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/swap.md): Swap lets you exchange supported assets across Polaris, which currently are the Core Assets. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/swap
- [vePOLAR](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/vepolar.md): Commit POLAR to receive vePOLAR voting power and participate in protocol stewardship. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/vepolar
- [vpETH](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/vpeth.md): Supply vpETH to earn lending yield or borrow vpETH against ETH collateral. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/testnet/vpeth

## Risks

- [Risks](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/risks.md): Polaris is built as immutable onchain infrastructure. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/risks
- [Security Properties](https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/risks/security-properties.md): Polaris is designed to minimize trust wherever possible, although some sources of uncertainty remain unavoidable and are covered in the dedicated Risks section. Canonical: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/risks/security-properties
